name: Taxable Distribution Expense Deduction

eligibility.description: Applies to transferees who receive a taxable distribution from a trust and incur professional or legal fees related to the GST tax compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The taxable amount of a generation-skipping distribution is reduced by any expenses incurred by the transferee in determining, collecting, or seeking a refund of the GST tax.
